title: Dijkstra — Shortest Path
description: Given a weighted directed graph of n nodes and m edges, find the shortest distance from node 0 to all other nodes.
inputSpec: First line: n (nodes) and m (edges). Next m lines: u v w (edge from u to v with weight w).
outputSpec: n integers on one line: dist[0], dist[1], ..., dist[n-1]. Print -1 for unreachable nodes.

botCodes.code:
import heapq
n,m=map(int,input().split())
adj=[[] for _ in range(n)]
for _ in range(m):
    u,v,w=map(int,input().split())
    adj[u].append((v,w))
dist=[float('inf')]*n;dist[0]=0
pq=[(0,0)]
while pq:
    d,u=heapq.heappop(pq)
    if d>dist[u]:continue
    for v,w in adj[u]:
        if dist[u]+w<dist[v]:dist[v]=dist[u]+w;heapq.heappush(pq,(dist[v],v))
print(*[-1 if d==float('inf') else d for d in dist])
